title: Vanta Vendor
description: A third-party vendor tracked in the Vanta compliance platform for security review

id.description: Unique vendor identifier assigned by Vanta

riskLevel.description: Inherent risk level based on data access and criticality

residualRiskLevel.description: Residual risk level after security controls are applied

hasContract.description: Whether a signed contract exists with this vendor

hasDpa.description: Whether a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) exists

createdAt.description: When this vendor was added to Vanta

nextReviewDate.description: Date of the next scheduled security review
